_note: Key universal and safety codes referenced in CV2 compliance review

fire_protection.NFPA_1: Fire Code — general fire safety requirements
fire_protection.NFPA_72: National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code
fire_protection.NFPA_101: Life Safety Code (alternative to IBC egress)

structural.ASCE_7: Minimum Design Loads — wind, seismic, snow

accessibility.ICC_A117_1: Accessible and Usable Buildings and Facilities

occupational_safety.OSHA_1910_37: Maintenance and Safeguards for Exit Routes

environmental.LEED: Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design
environmental.CalGreen: California Green Building Standards Code (where applicable)

sprinkler_thresholds.A: All A occupancies > 12,000 sq ft or > 300 occupants
sprinkler_thresholds.B: High-rise buildings (>55 ft above lowest discharge level)
sprinkler_thresholds.E: E occupancies > 12,000 sq ft or > 1 story
sprinkler_thresholds.R: All R occupancies (NFPA 13R for ≤4 stories; NFPA 13D for 1-2 family)
